1: Lest, if if thou be silent to me, I become like them that go down into the pit.
2: When I lift up my hands toward thy holy oracle.
3: Which speak peace to their neighbours, but mischief is is in their hearts.
5: He shall destroy them, and not build them up.
6: Because he hath heard the voice of my supplications.
7: Therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth; and with my song will I praise him.
8: And he is is the saving strength of his anointed.
9: Feed them also, and lift them up for ever.
